company_name: 公益社団法人北海道シルバー人材センター連合会
hunter_likelihood_reason: Silver Human Resources Center for senior part-time/temporary staffing; excludes headhunter classification
notes: Official site https://webc.sjc.ne.jp/doushiren/ confirmed by Dokobot showing company name. Contact form found at /inquiry_1. No public email. Company is a senior-focused temporary/light-work staffing federation, not a headhunter.
